apps.name: Ai-Job-Agent
apps.description: AI-powered job application automation — generates cover letters, optimizes resumes with keywords, and creates interview prep using Google Gemini.

apps.name: Secure-Deployer
apps.description: Secure deployment management dashboard for reviewing, approving, and auditing infrastructure deployments with role-based access control.

apps.name: BugJaeger
apps.description: Full-stack bug tracking and triage platform with FastAPI backend, SQLite persistence, and a React frontend served via nginx in Docker.

apps.name: Download-Command-Center
apps.description: Intelligent download queue manager with AI-assisted metadata extraction, SQLite storage, and a full-stack Express + React architecture.

apps.name: Tab-Sorter
apps.description: Browser tab organisation utility that groups, labels, and exports open tabs using customisable sorting rules.

apps.name: Reportify
apps.description: AI-powered report generation tool that converts raw data and templates into polished, formatted documents using Google Gemini.

apps.name: AstraDup
apps.description: Cross-storage video file deduplication tracker that scans multiple drives, fingerprints video files, and surfaces duplicate content.

apps.name: Playbook-Generator
apps.description: Ansible homelab playbook generator powered by Google Gemini — describe your infrastructure and get production-ready YAML playbooks instantly.

apps.name: ElderPhoto
apps.description: Accessibility-first family photo platform with large-button UI for elderly users, FastAPI backend, and React frontend for uploading and browsing photos.
